2026-0245
2026-03-24ESDCAccessible Canada ActReappointment of a director of the Canadian Accessibility Standards Development OrganizationReappointment of William Kirkwood Adair of Toronto, Ontario, as a director of the Canadian Accessibility Standards Development Organization, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years, effective March 25, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a director of the Canadian Accessibility Standards Development Organization
precis: Reappointment of William Kirkwood Adair of Toronto, Ontario, as a director of the Canadian Accessibility Standards Development Organization, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years, effective March 25, 2026.
